title: Automate project intake with multi-agent AI using MCP, Google ADK, Cloud Run, and BigQuery
summary: Google Cloud Tech shows how to build a multi-agent AI system for automating project intake workflows. The system integrates Asana webhooks with Google Cloud Run services, uses the Agent Development Kit (ADK) for orchestration, dispatches specialist agents in parallel via the Agent-to-Agent protocol, and leverages the Model Context Protocol to connect Vertex AI agents to BigQuery and Asana. The architecture demonstrates secure enterprise-grade agent deployment using pay-per-request Cloud Run containers.
